decision.summary: No new action: the active daily 77k dip has recovered and remains the cleanest thesis-aligned position, while no second daily or weekly setup offers enough edge.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. BTC spot is 77233.77, sitting only about 0.12% above the 24h low, with shorts still dominant and open interest flat. That is consistent with the Beecthor-style bearish thesis rather than with a bullish reversal worth fading it. The active daily 77k dip has recovered to roughly 63.5% and is back in profit, so it clearly remains the right same-day expression; it is nowhere near the 90-95% take-profit zone, so there is no management action to take. The next downside daily, 76k dip, is only around 5.3% and too far/weak, while the upside daily alternative, 78k reach, has fallen to about 19.5% and no longer represents a clean momentum continuation. On the weekly side, the frontier remains poor: 80k reach is only around 6% and 70k dip around 1.1%, so neither weekly slot deserves a new entry. With only six hours left in the daily market, the disciplined move is to keep holding the active 77k dip and avoid forcing an unnecessary additional trade.
